hero.title: Manage Your MikroTik Hotspots from Anywhere
hero.subtitle: A powerful SaaS platform to control your WiFi networks, generate codes, and manage users — all from one place.

features.title: Everything You Need to Run Your Hotspot

router.title: Router Management
router.desc: Connect and manage multiple MikroTik routers from a single dashboard.

voucher.title: Code System
voucher.desc: Generate WiFi codes with custom time limits, data caps, and speeds.

users.title: User Management
users.desc: Create hotspot users, monitor sessions, and control bandwidth in real-time.

customLogin.title: Custom Login Pages
customLogin.desc: Design branded captive portal login pages for each of your locations.

packages.title: Flexible Packages
packages.desc: Create unlimited plans with configurable duration, speed, and data limits.

dashboard.title: Smart Dashboard
dashboard.desc: View real-time statistics, connected users, and revenue analytics.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your network size. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: Perfect for small cafés and single-location hotspots.

pro.name: Professional
pro.desc: For growing businesses with multiple locations.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: Full power for large networks and ISPs.

verify.title: Verify Your Email
verify.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.helpDesc: A complete overview of your network: connected routers, active users, used codes, and revenue. Use the quick actions to navigate directly to any section.
dashboard.trialExpiredBanner: Your free trial has ended. Please renew your subscription to continue using all features.

routers.title: Routers
routers.helpDesc: Connect your MikroTik devices to the platform. Add a router by entering its IP address, API port, and login credentials, then test the connection. Each router gets a unique API key used to link the login page.
routers.name: Router Name
routers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this router?
routers.empty: No routers added yet. Click 'Add Router' to get started.

packages.title: Packages
packages.helpDesc: Packages define what a customer gets when using a WiFi code: duration, upload/download speed, data limit, and price. Create different packages (e.g., 1 hour, 1 day, 1 week) to suit your customers' needs.
packages.name: Package Name
packages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this package?

vouchers.title: Codes
vouchers.helpDesc: Codes are WiFi access cards your customers use to connect. Select a package and quantity, then click Generate. You can print them (receipt size) or copy and share them. Click any code to view details and QR code.
vouchers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete selected codes?

hotspotUsers.title: Hotspot Users
hotspotUsers.helpDesc: Hotspot users are customers connected to your network. You can create manual accounts (username & password) or let them use codes. Monitor their data usage, connection time, and disconnect or delete them as needed.
hotspotUsers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

loginPages.title: Login Page Templates
loginPages.helpDesc: The login page is the first thing customers see when connecting to your network. Choose a ready-made template, add your business name and logo. Each router gets its own page. You can also use the advanced editor for custom HTML/CSS.
loginPages.description: Choose a template, add your brand name and logo — your customers will see it when connecting to WiFi.
loginPages.noRouters: Add a router first to save your login page design.
loginPages.businessNameHint: This name will appear on the login page your customers see.
loginPages.logoMaxSize: Max 500 KB — PNG, JPG, or SVG

settings.title: Settings
settings.helpDesc: Update your personal information like name, phone number, and company name. You can also change your password and switch the interface language between Arabic and English.
settings.name: Name

plans.chooseSubtitle: Start with a 5-day free trial. No credit card required.

billing.title: Billing & Subscription
billing.helpDesc: View your current plan details and limits (routers, users, codes). Track your invoices and payment status. When you have a pending invoice, contact us via WhatsApp or email to complete payment and activate your subscription.
billing.noInvoicesHint: Invoices will appear here after your trial ends.
billing.paymentDesc: To activate your subscription, please make a payment via one of the methods below. Your account will be activated immediately after confirmation.
